name: Swiss Steak-Crock Pot <Mom's>
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, mix flour with salt and pepper.
2. Dredge the chopped steak in the seasoned flour mixture until evenly coated.
3. Place the sliced onion, chopped carrot, and chopped celery at the bottom of the crockpot.
4. Add the dredged steak on top of the vegetables.
5. Pour the tomato sauce over the meat.
6. Cook on low for 8-10 hours or high for 3-5 hours until the steak is tender.
